{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323202310766A56CE04298FE1D57B"}"},"total":353},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588612956671279897","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的非常真实，能让人身临其境。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766873490,"group_id":"7566554030466403353","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny4sJBwUGEk56W/grR410RZ1SWefA6NHvOHJvSyhWYeO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4037872789762366","user_name":"九阴山的杜兆辉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4037872789762366","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7566554030466403353","book_info":{"abstract":"魂穿四合院，成了秦淮茹乡下的妹夫。
没有系统，没系统，没系统，空间也只是有个保鲜功能。少戾气。生活过日子，家长里短。
拥有后世灵魂的牛大壮，脸皮厚，能力强，还有点小坏，生活在六七十年代，如鱼得水。
多影视，一部四合院已经放不下牛大壮那颗统统拿下的心，
什么秦淮茹，什么于丽，什么娄晓娥，什么徐慧珍……只要吃到嘴里来都是好草。
谁让咱们老牛胃口好，还不怎么挑食。
